3193750.name: Abyssfall: Seekers Within
3193750.description:
For centuries, scholars believed that the Aegles were the first non-native race to have passed through the Halcyome and set foot on Prism. However, the recent discovery of an ancient edifice, hidden deep within the labyrinthine caverns beneath the burning sands of Helix, tells a different story. The buried tower, filled with advanced technology far beyond anything known to present-day Prism, challenges everything the scholars once held as truth, casting the very history of their world into doubt.

As an explorer tasked with reaching the bottom of the tower, you'll battle deadly creatures and uncover ancient secrets with your fellow explorers, descending deeper into danger and antiquity with every step forward.

From the creators of Postknight 2 and King's League II comes Abyssfall, a roguelike RPG that offers a fresh and innovative take on grid-based combat paired with compelling character-driven storytelling.

Roguelike RPG - Built for Replayability


Ever-changing floors mean that no two runs down the tower will be exactly the same. While the tower's denizens may remember you, the paths you take to get to them and the challenges you face might differ from one descent to the next. Your fellow explorers may show up in different areas each run, so you'll have to make some tough recruitment decisions, picking the team that will best adapt to and overcome the tower's many perils. Through the use of artifacts, magical buffs, and newfound abilities, you and your allies will grow stronger over time - perhaps strong enough to face whatever awaits you at the very bottom of the tower.

Grid-Based Action Combat - Refreshing Take on a Classic


Within the narrow confines of the Tower's floors, you'll have to adapt your combat tactics to both the environment and the hostile denizens looking to put an end to your progress. Abyssfall's grid-based combat system offers a fresh take on the traditional action roguelike by fusing fast-paced action with a structured, tactical approach to battle. With the emphasis on strategic movement and tactical planning, Abyssfall's grid-based system will allow you and your fellow explorers to fully grasp the range of combat options at your disposal, empowering you to make impactful decisions in the heat of battle.

Character-Driven Narrative - A Mystery Waiting to be Unravelled:


As you delve deeper into the tower, unearthing the secrets of its ancient builders and confronting the creatures that have adapted and evolved over millennia within its shadowy confines, the bonds of trust forged with your fellow explorers may prove to be your greatest strength in the face of ever-growing peril. Like you, your fellow explorers come with their own unique backstories, personalities, and motivations for embarking on this mission. As their personal stories unfold, so too does the narrative, weaving together individual journeys that propel the larger story forward. Abyssfall's narrative is further enriched through the carefully crafted environmental details scattered throughout the tower. Whether it's a weathered automaton wandering aimlessly through the shadowy halls or an ancient tree whose luminous flowers bathe its chamber in an ethereal glow, each element whispers of a forgotten past waiting to be uncovered.
